section.heading: Purposes
section.chapeau: The purpose of this chapter is to establish regional research programs, under effective Federal oversight, to—

paragraph.content: set priorities for regional marine and coastal research in support of efforts to safeguard the water quality and ecosystem health of each region; and
carry out such research through grants and improved coordination.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 92–532, title IV, § 401, as added Pub. L. 101–593, title III, § 301, Nov. 16, 1990, 104 Stat. 2963.)
